title: SFriends
description: SFriends is a Forge Minecraft mod that hides all player nicknames upon spawning. Nicknames of friends will appear in green when within a 75-block radius. To add a friend, players must meet and press a designated key binding.
body:
# SFriends

**SFriends** is a Forge Minecraft mod that hides all player nicknames upon spawning. Nicknames of friends will appear in green when within a 75-block radius. To add a friend, players must meet and press a designated key binding.

Features:

**- Hide All Player Nicknames:** All player names are hidden by default.

**- Friend System:** Add players as friends by meeting them and pressing the bind key.

**- Green Nicknames for Friends:** Friends' nicknames appear in green within a 75-block radius.

**- Delete Friends:** There is a command for deleting friends, just use - /delfriend NICKNAME

**TODO**

Configuration File: Add a setting to change the radius of friends display.

**Disclaimer**

This mod is provided as-is and may contain bugs. The mod was tested only on Forge version (47.3.0) 1.20.1. You can test it on different versions of 1.20.1+ and send your feedback in the comments if you want.

**MY DISCORD: sosad2114**
